cars.name: Aston Martin Valkyrie
cars.info: An F1-inspired hypercar designed by Adrian Newey, featuring a naturally aspirated 6.5L V12 engine.

cars.name: McLaren P1
cars.info: A legendary hybrid hypercar that redefined performance with its advanced aerodynamic design.

cars.name: Pagani Huayra
cars.info: A masterpiece of automotive art, blending Italian craftsmanship with a powerful twin-turbo V12 engine.

cars.name: Lamborghini Revuelto
cars.info: Lamborghini's first high-performance hybrid supercar, combining a powerful V12 with electric motors.

cars.name: Ferrari SF90 Stradale
cars.info: Ferrari's most advanced plug-in hybrid supercar, offering unparalleled track performance.

cars.name: Rimac Nevera
cars.info: A record-breaking electric hypercar that showcases the future of speed with its insane acceleration.

cars.name: Koenigsegg Jesko
cars.info: A speed king designed for raw power and aerodynamics, capable of extreme performance on any track.

cars.name: Bugatti La Voiture Noire
cars.info: One of the most exclusive and expensive cars ever made, representing the pinnacle of luxury.

cars.name: Mercedes-AMG ONE
cars.info: A road-legal hypercar that utilizes genuine Formula 1 powertrain technology.

cars.name: Porsche 911 GT3 RS
cars.info: The ultimate track-focused sports car, engineered for precision, grip, and pure driver connection.
